Live-auth runs against production (nrcseam.techivano.com). Baseline on origin/main (2026-04-23): the second card's role combobox stayed disabled (Radix Select trigger data-disabled), so the test timed out waiting for an enabled click. This matches production user/RBAC data, not a Phase 3 regression; kit assembly UI does not touch Users.tsx.
flaky-pending-cleanup.plannedFixPhase: Live-auth data — use a mutable non-admin target user or gate the assertion on enabled state

flaky-pending-cleanup.reason: Live-auth production baseline (origin/main, 2026-04-23): movements and GRN flows failed because /app/inventory/movements used Movements embedInShell, which previously omitted any 'Inventory Movements' heading (shell only exposes h1 'Inventory'). Repo now renders an h2 page title when embedInShell; production may still lag until deploy. GRN dialog combobox timeout is environmental flakiness on prod.
flaky-pending-cleanup.plannedFixPhase: Deploy shell title fix; then re-evaluate GRN live-auth stability
